ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the feature belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the feature belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_features" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature within the project */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_features_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, end-user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the report is about */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug report */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the bug */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bug report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bug report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the feature request */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the analytic is about */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_stability" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stability record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the stability record is about */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the feature */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stability record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_stability_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
